metadata.name: Check Water Quality After Contamination Alert

description: An upstream sensor detects a potential contaminant. An operator must check downstream sensors to see if it has reached the public water supply.

nodes.task_description: Receive a 'High Turbidity' alert from a sensor in the main water reservoir.

expected_outcome.value: Agent acknowledges the water quality alert.

nodes.task_description: Query all real-time water quality sensors at various points in the distribution network.

expected_outcome.value: Agent retrieves a list of sensor readings from across the city.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the data and confirm that all sensors within the public distribution network show normal readings, indicating the contamination is contained in the reservoir.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly determines the public water supply is currently safe.
